text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
One evening, as we're walking through the
shopping district...

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: That looks like so much fun!

text_block_list.name: Raffle Clerk
text_block_list.text:
Step right up and try your luck with our New
Year's lottery! This year's grand-prize is a coupon
for a hot spring vacation for two!

text_block_list.name: Raffle Clerk
text_block_list.text:
First-prize winners get a deluxe carrot hamburger
steak! Second-prize winners get a bushel of
carrots! And third-prize winners can take home a
single carrot!

text_block_list.name: Raffle Clerk
text_block_list.text:
Oh, Urara, good to see you! Whaddaya say?
Wanna give the raffle a whirl?

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: A raffle! I do, I do, I dooo!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: Trainer! Can I give it a go?

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: A ticket? What's that? I need one for the raffle?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I explain to her that she needs to buy things in
the shopping district in order to get a ticket.

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
Oh! You mean like this ticket that lady gave me
the other day?

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: She gave me one along with a piece of candy!
choice_data_list: You can try it out with that!
You can try it out with that!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: Yaaay! I'll give it a spin!
choice_data_list: What prize would you like to get?

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: Huh? Um, hmmm...

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
Going to the hot springs sounds fun, but I really
like hamburger steak, and of course I'd be happy
with carrots, too!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
Even if I lose, just spinning it is fun! So I'm fine
either way! ♪

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: I bet it'll spin so fast! Spinny-spin-spiiiin! ♪

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Haru Urara excitedly encourages me to join her in
pulling the lever.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
A small plastic ball drops from the spinner's
opening...

text_block_list.name: Raffle Clerk
text_block_list.text:
Holy mackerel! We've got ourselves a grand-prize
winner! Come and get the coupon for your hot
spring vacation! Congratulations!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: You obtained: <itemname>

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
Wow! That sound was amazing! Hey, can I hear it
again?

text_block_list.name: Raffle Clerk
text_block_list.text:
U-Urara! You got the top prize! The hot spring
coupon!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: Hot springs? I get to go to the hot springs?!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: Yaaay! I won, Trainer!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: Yeah! Hey, when can I go? Tomorrow?

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
Huh? Then when? The day after tomorrow? Or
the day after that?!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: How many times does the sun have to go across the sky before we can go? Hurry up, Mr. Sun!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
While I understand her excitement, going on a
trip to the hot springs when we're in the middle of
training feels wrong... Perhaps I can use it as
motivation?
choice_data_list:
How about we save it as a treat for winning a
race?

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
A treat? That's something that only good,
hard-working people get, right?!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
I want a treat! Take me to the hot springs as a
treat someday!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
Oh! How about you keep the coupon? I'll be
super happy when I get it as a treat for winning!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
Then you can be like, "Hey! Here's your treat!"
and hand it to me!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: Heehee, I can't wait! ♪

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I'll keep the hot spring coupon safe until it's time
to use it.

text_block_list.name: Raffle Clerk
text_block_list.text:
Looks like we have a first-prize winner!
Congratulations! You get one deluxe carrot
hamburger steak!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: You obtained: <itemname>

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: Wow! A carrot hamburger steak! It looks so good!

text_block_list.name: Raffle Clerk
text_block_list.text: This isn't your ordinary hamburger steak! It's a deluxe one!

text_block_list.name: Raffle Clerk
text_block_list.text:
I promise this will blow all the others you've
tasted outta the water!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: Gulp... Does that mean...

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: If I eat it, my stomach is gonna explode?!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
Regular hamburger steaks are delicious just by
themselves! If this one's gonna blow all the water
out of me, then it must have a bomb inside of it!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: Hmmm, should I still try it?

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: I am!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
Just you watch! Trainer and I are both gonna
finish off your hamburger steak bomb!

text_block_list.name: Raffle Clerk
text_block_list.text:
I'm not sure what you're talking about, but I've
never seen you this fired up!

text_block_list.name: Raffle Clerk
text_block_list.text:
I'll leave it in your hands! Here you go, the deluxe
carrot hamburger steak!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: Time to dig in!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After returning to the academy, we split the
hamburger steak and enjoy its explosive flavor.

text_block_list.name: Raffle Clerk
text_block_list.text:
We got a second-prize winner! It's your lucky day!
You're going home with a bushel of carrots!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: You obtained: <itemname>

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: Wow! That's so many carrots!

text_block_list.name: Raffle Clerk
text_block_list.text: This prize was basically made for you, Urara!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: Yeah, I love carrots!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
But this is a bit much... Can I really eat them all by
myself?

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: Oh, I know! I'll share them with my friends!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
Let's see... I'll give one to Spe, Teio, Sei, King,
Rice, and...
choice_data_list: You've got a lot of people to share these with.
You've got a lot of people to share these with.

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: Yeah! I have so many great friends!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
I know bunches and bunches of people who'd
wanna eat some yummy carrots!

text_block_list.name: Vegetable Seller
text_block_list.text: What a sweet friend you are, Urara!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
Oh! Long time, no see! What are you doing here?
Shouldn't you be at your vegetable stand?

text_block_list.name: Vegetable Seller
text_block_list.text:
Those are my carrots, silly! I'll throw in something
extra too, so stop by my stall!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: Really? Thank you! ♪

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
Heehee... I'm gonna throw a carrot party for
everyone at school!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Of course, it isn't enough for a school-wide party,
but with the addition of the extras from the
vegetable seller, we go home with a pretty huge
haul of carrots.

text_block_list.name: Raffle Clerk
text_block_list.text:
Would you lookie here! You've won the
third-prize! Here's your carrot!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: You obtained: <itemname>

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: Wow! What a shiny carrot! Thank you!

text_block_list.name: Raffle Clerk
text_block_list.text:
You're happy with just a single carrot? What a
sweet girl you are.

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
A single carrot is still a carrot! It's delicious and
nutritious!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
I'll give you half, Trainer! Which do you want?
The bottom or the top?

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: Really? Then I'll take the top half...

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: Never mind! I'll give you the top half!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
Because there's more to eat! So you should have
it!

text_block_list.name: Raffle Clerk
text_block_list.text: Urara... You have such an incredibly kind heart... Sniff...

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: Huh?! Why are you crying?!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After being praised, Haru Urara gives me the top
half of the carrot. It tastes sweet and crisp.

text_block_list.name: Raffle Clerk
text_block_list.text:
Ohhh, tough luck! Looks like you pulled a blank
one! Take this pack of tissues as a consolation
prize.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: You obtained: <itemname>

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: Aww, just tissues...

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: But at least spinning it was really fun! Thanks!

text_block_list.name: Raffle Clerk
text_block_list.text: I'm sorry that's all you get, Urara...

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: No problem! Tissues are really handy!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
I can take a bunch of them and crumple them
together, aaaand...

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: Ta-da! It's a carrot!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
It doesn't really look like one since it's white,
though. Carrots are orange...

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: Oh geez, I really want a carrot now...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It seems that all of her famous energy has been
sapped away by this disappointment.
